original: The academy’s lockdown is a system of artificery that covers the entire academy building. Once activated, it creates magical barriers that isolate and protect each room in the building. These barriers can’t be breached with physical or magical force. They also block mages from teleporting through them.
translation: 学院的封锁系统会利用奥术能源覆盖整栋教学楼。被激活后，封锁系统会创造魔法屏障，将教学楼的每个房间独立保护起来。这些屏障无法被物理或魔法手段突破，也能阻止法师进行传送。

translation: 简的证言
context:
{
  "reference name": "JanTest",
  "display name": "Jan's Statement",
  "description": "Thirty minutes before the Ianus twins found the body, Bellwether walked past Jan in the west wing hallway. He was in her path, so she shoved him out of her way. original: Thirty minutes before the Ianus twins found the body, Bellwether walked past Jan in the west wing hallway. He was in her path, so she shoved him out of her way. After that, she knocked over a vase and shattered it. Even though Jan didn’t say anything to her, she yelled at him to “Be quiet!”. After this interaction, she walked into Lecture Hall 2-B.
translation: 伊努斯双子发现尸体半小时前，贝尔维瑟在走廊西翼与简擦肩而过。贝尔维瑟仿佛觉得简挡路，直接把他推开了。之后，凯瑟琳·贝尔维瑟还打碎了一个花瓶。简虽然什么都没说，但还是被骂“安静！”。之后贝尔维瑟进了 2-B 讲堂。

translation: 奥术构造体的逻辑缺陷
context:
{
  "reference name": "Logic",
  "display name": "Construct’s Logic Limitation",
  "description": "Arcane Constructs process tasks in the order that they are given. If a Construct is ordered to complete tasks A, B, and C, it will process each of those tasks individually. If task B is impossible, the Construct won’t realize this until it reaches task B. When it reaches task B, it will deem the entire series of commands as impossible and stop what it’s doing (without even attempting to complete task C).",
  "type": "",
  "school": "",
  "incantation": "",
  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",
  "concentration": "",
  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}

original: Arcane Constructs process tasks in the order that they are given. If a Construct is ordered to complete tasks A, B, and C, it will process each of those tasks individually. If task B is impossible, the Construct won’t realize this until it reaches task B. When it reaches task B, it will deem the entire series of commands as impossible and stop what it’s doing (without even attempting to complete task C).
translation: 奥术构造体只能按顺序执行任务。如果被命令完成任务 A、B、C，构造体会逐个完成任务。如果任务 B 不可能成功，构造体在开始执行任务 B 之前都不会察觉。但在任务 B 开始后，构造体就会认为整个指令都无法完成，随即中止行动（任务 C 也会被随之放弃）。

If task B is impossible, the Construct won’t realize this until it reaches task B. When it reaches task B, it will deem the entire series of commands as impossible and stop what it’s doing (without even attempting to complete task C).",

translation: 斯蒂尔文德的推理
context:
{
  "reference name": "Theory",
  "display name": "Steelwind's Deduction",
  "description": "The prosecution’s theory lays out the following timeline for Catherine Bellwether’s movements on the day of the murder.\r\n12:00pm-1:00pm: Theodore Redmond has a meeting with Bellwether.\r\n1:00pm: Miriam Frega saw Bellwether walking in the hallways.\r\n1:00pm-2:00pm: Bellwether spent time in the library.\r\n2:00pm-2:30pm: Wallace Nightgrave murdered Bellwether.\r\n2:30pm: Jan Hughes witnessed Bellwether walking towards Lecture Hall 2-B.\r\n3:00pm: The Ianus sisters discovered Bellwether’s body.  \r",
  "type": "",
  "school": "",
  "incantation": "",
  "gesture": "",
  "duration": "",
  "concentration": "",
  "series": "",
  "tag": "",
  "token position": "",
  "battle map size": ""
}

original:
The prosecution’s theory lays out the following timeline for Catherine Bellwether’s movements on the day of the murder.
12:00pm-1:00pm: Theodore Redmond has a meeting with Bellwether.
1:00pm: Miriam Frega saw Bellwether walking in the hallways.
1:00pm-2:00pm: Bellwether spent time in the library.
2:00pm-2:30pm: Wallace Nightgrave murdered Bellwether.
2:30pm: Jan Hughes witnessed Bellwether walking towards Lecture Hall 2-B.
3:00pm: The Ianus sisters discovered Bellwether’s body.

  "reference name": "Construct",
  "display name": "Arcane Constructs",
  "description": "Arcane Constructs are suits of armour that are animated using artificery. They can carry out simple tasks when ordered to. These voice lines can only be changed or adjusted by the academy headmaster.\r\n\r\nEvery command given to a Construct is stored in its command log.
